summary: Extensive burn injuries include grade 3 burns on multiple body parts; however, singeing of eyebrows and facial hair by itself lacks specificity for proving inhalation injury compared to other more indicative findings like blackish soot on the tongue or changes in voice quality. Thus, it’s insufficient standalone evidence for confirming inhalational damage. \boxed{}
